content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — release_notes.txt:1-2 says "public beta! We're still testing the new sync feature, so expect rough edges", implying an unfinished build.
Pierre: Apple's guideline 2.2 rejects App Store submissions labeled as betas, trials, or demos — that language belongs on TestFlight. The release notes explicitly call this a "public beta" that is "still testing" and has "rough edges," which may trigger review questions or a rejection. Rewrite the release notes to describe finished features (e.g. "New: task sync across devices") without beta/test wording.
